milestone: Draft Asset Architecture, Phase E: verification, cross-owner resolution fix, and canonical doc
slice: Closes the full Draft Asset Architecture plan (Phases A-E). Full end-to-end regression across both surfaces (author->save->reload->Build/Publish->Studio-render), a genuinely forced network-failure recovery test, and one real, previously-undiscovered gap found while verifying Magic Card recall specifically, fixed at its root in the shared js/assetStore.js module: resolve() always computed the Storage object path from the CURRENT session's own owner id, with no way to resolve an asset belonging to a DIFFERENT owner. Fix: resolve(ref, opts) gained an optional opts.ownerId -- a FALLBACK, tried only after the current session's own owner id fails first -- benefiting both surfaces since the module is shared. World Builder v2's own Overview Thumbnail upload -> real reload -> real ProjectCompiler.runBuild() cycle was re-verified byte-identical against the original fixture as part of Phase E's own full end-to-end pass. Verified via a new 30-assertion Playwright suite (spanning both surfaces) plus full regression across every prior Phase A/B/C/D suite and both goldenBuild.js suites, all unchanged. New canonical docs/DRAFT_ASSET_ARCHITECTURE.md mirrors docs/THEME_REPOSITORY_ARCHITECTURE.md's own shape and is now the one place this whole feature's architecture/phased-history/verification-summary lives. Cache-bust bumped to ?v=0104 on every tag since this changes js/assetStore.js (loaded from this same index.html) even though no worldBuilderApp.js/CSS change was needed this phase. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model change.
